properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM parser for Palo Alto PAN-OS
properties.query:
let EventSeverityLookup = datatable (LogSeverity: string, EventSeverity: string)
[
    "0", "Low",
    "1", "Low",
    "2", "Low",
    "3", "Low",
    "4", "Low",
    "5", "Low",
    "6", "Medium",
    "7", "Medium",
    "8", "Medium",
    "9", "High",
    "10", "High"
];
let EventResultLookup = datatable (DeviceEventClassID: string, EventResult: string, EventResultDetails: string)
[
    "auth-success", "Success", "",
    "auth-fail", "Failure", "No such user or password",
    "auth-error", "Failure", "Other",
    "auth-timeout", "Failure", "Session expired",
    "auth-challenge", "Partial", "MFA not satisfied",
    "auth-unknown", "Failure", "Other",
    "auth", "NA", ""
];
let parser = (disabled: bool=false, pack: bool=false) {
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where not(disabled)
        and DeviceVendor == "Palo Alto Networks"
        and DeviceProduct == "PAN-OS"
        and DeviceEventClassID startswith "auth"
    | lookup EventResultLookup on DeviceEventClassID
    | extend EventResult = coalesce(EventResult, "NA")
    | parse-kv AdditionalExtensions as (
        PanOSAuthenticationDescription: string,
        PanOSAuthenticationProtocol: string,
        PanOSAuthenticatedUserDomain: string,
        PanOSAuthenticatedUserName: string,
        PanOSAuthenticatedUserUUID: string,
        PanOSClientTypeName: string,
        PanOSConfigVersion: string,
        PanOSCortexDataLakeTenantID: string,
        PanOSDGHierarchyLevel1: string,
        PanOSDGHierarchyLevel2: string,
        PanOSDGHierarchyLevel3: string,
        PanOSDGHierarchyLevel4: string,
        PanOSIsDuplicateLog: string,
        PanOSLogExported: string,
        PanOSLogForwarded: string,
        PanOSIsPrismaNetworks: string,
        PanOSIsPrismaUsers: string,
        PanOSLocation: string,
        PanOSLogSource: string,
        LogSourceGroupID: string,
        PanOSLogSourceTimeZoneOffset: string,
        PanOSMFAVendor: string,
        PanOSPanoramaSN: string,
        PlatformType: string,
        PanOSRuleMatched: string,
        PanOSRuleMatchedUUID: string,
        PanOSAuthCacheServiceRegion: string,
        PanOSSessionID: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceCategory: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceHost: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceMac: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceModel: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceOSFamily: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceOSVersion: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceProfile: string,
        PanOSSourceDeviceVendor: string,
        PanOSTimeGeneratedHighResolution: string,
        PanOSUserAgentString: string,
        PanOSVirtualSystemID: string,
        PanOSVirtualSystemName: string,
        start: string
    ) with (pair_delimiter=";", kv_delimiter="=")
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveDvcFQDN('DeviceName')
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveSrcFQDN('PanOSSourceDeviceHost')
    | lookup EventSeverityLookup on LogSeverity
    | extend
        temp_SrcIpAddr = coalesce(SourceIP, DeviceCustomIPv6Address2),
        temp_TargetIpAddr = coalesce(DestinationIP, DeviceCustomIPv6Address3),
        temp_DvcIpAddr = Computer
    | extend
        SrcIpAddr = iff(temp_SrcIpAddr matches regex @"^[0-9a-fA-F:\.]+$", temp_SrcIpAddr, ""),
        TargetIpAddr = iff(temp_TargetIpAddr matches regex @"^[0-9a-fA-F:\.]+$", temp_TargetIpAddr, ""),
        DvcIpAddr = iff(temp_DvcIpAddr matches regex @"^[0-9a-fA-F:\.]+$", temp_DvcIpAddr, ""),
        DvcHostname = case(
            temp_DvcIpAddr matches regex @"^[0-9a-fA-F:\.]+$", DvcHostname,
            isnotempty(temp_DvcIpAddr), temp_DvcIpAddr,
            DvcHostname
        ),
        EventStartTime = coalesce(todatetime(start), TimeGenerated),
        EventMessage = Message,
        TargetUsername = coalesce(PanOSAuthenticatedUserName, DestinationUserName, SourceUserName),
        AdditionalFields = iff(pack, bag_pack(
            "PanOSAuthenticationDescription", PanOSAuthenticationDescription,
            "PanOSClientTypeName", PanOSClientTypeName,
            "PanOSConfigVersion", PanOSConfigVersion,
            "PanOSCortexDataLakeTenantID", PanOSCortexDataLakeTenantID,
            "PanOSDGHierarchyLevel1", PanOSDGHierarchyLevel1,
            "PanOSDGHierarchyLevel2", PanOSDGHierarchyLevel2,
            "PanOSDGHierarchyLevel3", PanOSDGHierarchyLevel3,
            "PanOSDGHierarchyLevel4", PanOSDGHierarchyLevel4,
            "PanOSIsDuplicateLog", PanOSIsDuplicateLog,
            "PanOSLogExported", PanOSLogExported,
            "PanOSLogForwarded", PanOSLogForwarded,
            "PanOSIsPrismaNetworks", PanOSIsPrismaNetworks,
            "PanOSIsPrismaUsers", PanOSIsPrismaUsers,
            "PanOSLocation", PanOSLocation,
            "PanOSLogSource", PanOSLogSource,
            "LogSourceGroupID", LogSourceGroupID,
            "PanOSLogSourceTimeZoneOffset", PanOSLogSourceTimeZoneOffset,
            "PanOSMFAVendor", PanOSMFAVendor,
            "PanOSPanoramaSN", PanOSPanoramaSN,
            "PlatformType", PlatformType,
            "PanOSRuleMatched", PanOSRuleMatched,
            "PanOSRuleMatchedUUID", PanOSRuleMatchedUUID,
            "PanOSAuthCacheServiceRegion", PanOSAuthCacheServiceRegion,
            "PanOSSourceDeviceCategory", PanOSSourceDeviceCategory,
            "PanOSSourceDeviceMac", PanOSSourceDeviceMac,
            "PanOSSourceDeviceModel", PanOSSourceDeviceModel,
            "PanOSSourceDeviceOSVersion", PanOSSourceDeviceOSVersion,
            "PanOSSourceDeviceProfile", PanOSSourceDeviceProfile,
            "PanOSSourceDeviceVendor", PanOSSourceDeviceVendor,
            "PanOSTimeGeneratedHighResolution", PanOSTimeGeneratedHighResolution,
            "PanOSVirtualSystemID", PanOSVirtualSystemID,
            "PanOSVirtualSystemName", PanOSVirtualSystemName,
            DeviceCustomNumber1Label, FieldDeviceCustomNumber1,
            DeviceCustomNumber2Label, FieldDeviceCustomNumber2,
            DeviceCustomString3Label, DeviceCustomString3,
            DeviceCustomString4Label, DeviceCustomString4,
            DeviceCustomString5Label, DeviceCustomString5,
            DeviceCustomString6Label, DeviceCustomString6
        ), dynamic([]))
    | project-rename
        DvcId = DeviceExternalID,
        EventOriginalResultDetails = Message,
        EventOriginalSeverity = LogSeverity,
        EventOriginalType = DeviceEventClassID,
        EventProductVersion = DeviceVersion,
        LogonProtocol = PanOSAuthenticationProtocol,
        SrcDvcOs = PanOSSourceDeviceOSFamily,
        TargetUserId = PanOSAuthenticatedUserUUID,
        TargetDomain = PanOSAuthenticatedUserDomain,
        EventOriginalSubType = Activity,
        HttpUserAgent = PanOSUserAgentString,
        TargetSessionId = PanOSSessionID
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveDstFQDN('DestinationHostName')
    | extend
        TargetHostname = DstHostname,
        DvcAction = case(
            EventResult == "Success", "Allow",
            EventResult == "Failure", "Deny",
            ""
        ),
        Dvc = coalesce(DvcFQDN, DvcId, DvcHostname, DvcIpAddr),
        EventEndTime = EventStartTime,
        Dst = coalesce(DstFQDN, DstHostname, TargetIpAddr),
        Src = coalesce(SrcFQDN, SrcHostname, SrcIpAddr),
        TargetUserType = _ASIM_GetUserType(TargetUsername, ""),
        User = TargetUsername,
        IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
        DvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(DvcId), "Other", ""),
        TargetUserIdType = iff(isnotempty(TargetUserId), "UID", ""),
        TargetUsernameType = _ASIM_GetUsernameType(TargetUsername),
        TargetDomainType = case(
            array_length(split(TargetDomain, ".")) > 1, "FQDN",
            isnotempty(TargetDomain), "Windows",
            ""
        )
    | extend
        EventSchema = "Authentication",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.3",
        EventType = "Logon",
        EventProduct = "PAN-OS",
        EventVendor = "Palo Alto",
        EventCount = int(1),
        Type = "CommonSecurityLog"
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventType,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        EventSeverity,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        EventCount,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventMessage,
        EventOriginalResultDetails,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventOriginalSubType,
        EventProductVersion,
        Dvc,
        DvcHostname,
        DvcDomain,
        DvcFQDN,
        DvcDomainType,
        DvcIpAddr,
        DvcId,
        DvcIdType,
        TargetUsername,
        TargetUsernameType,
        TargetUserId,
        TargetUserIdType,
        TargetUserType,
        TargetDomain,
        TargetDomainType,
        TargetHostname,
        TargetIpAddr,
        TargetSessionId,
        DvcAction,
        SrcIpAddr,
        SrcHostname,
        SrcDomain,
        SrcFQDN,
        SrcDomainType,
        SrcDvcOs,
        LogonProtocol,
        HttpUserAgent,
        Dst,
        Src,
        User,
        IpAddr,
        AdditionalFields,
        Type
};
parser(disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
